parameters.query: UPDATE events_inbox SET processing_status = 'processing' WHERE event_id IN (SELECT event_id FROM events_inbox WHERE processing_status = 'ingested' ORDER BY received_at ASC LIMIT 50 FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED) RETURNING *;
INSERT INTO events_outbox (event_id, target, action, idempotency_key, payload) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING;
UPDATE events_inbox SET processing_status = 'processed' WHERE event_id = $1;
UPDATE events_inbox SET processing_status = 'error', last_error = $2, retry_count = retry_count + 1 WHERE event_id = $1;
